title: AdvancedVeinMiner
description: An Advanced VeinMiner plugin wich adds a VeinMine function to the game!
body:
# Core **Adds a veinmining function to the game wich works by first activating the veinminer, wich can be done by pressing the letter F, or, more specifically, your swap hands keybind.Then break the specific block you want to veinmine with the right tool.** # Commands ```Veinminer tools ``` - Activates the veinmining function, requires op to activate. # Utility By pressing, ``` F ``` ( aka your swap hands keybind) You will activate the Vein Mining function, wich will allow you to veinmine any blocks you mine ( if you use the right tool ).

Veinmining will make the player lose hunger, and also mines in a big square. To show that the veinmine function was turned on, there will be a note in chat that will state:

``` Veinminer has been turned ON``` ( in the color green ),

``` Veinminer has been turned OFF``` ( in the color red )
